"'''Freedom No More'''" is a roleplaying adventure published in the second edition of [[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'']].

==Plot summary==
Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] search for a missing [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|Rebel transport]], the ''[[Treasure Trove]]''. They later escape to [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], where they face [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].
